name: youtube
title: YouTube MCP Server
description: Search videos, fetch video/channel details, and read comments via the YouTube Data API v3.

toolDetails.name: youtube_search_videos
toolDetails.description: Search YouTube videos by query, with optional ordering.

toolDetails.name: youtube_get_video
toolDetails.description: Fetch full details (statistics, duration, tags) for a YouTube video by ID.

toolDetails.name: youtube_get_channel
toolDetails.description: Fetch YouTube channel details by channel ID or @handle.

toolDetails.name: youtube_list_channel_videos
toolDetails.description: List recent videos uploaded by a YouTube channel.

toolDetails.name: youtube_get_comments
toolDetails.description: Fetch top-level comments for a YouTube video.
